ideation: This animation sequence depicts a mammoth using its large arms to playfully move around.  The movement will be somewhat lumbering, reflecting the mammoth's size and nature. The first frame shows both arms extended forward, palms down, as if the mammoth is reaching out to grasp something. The second frame shows the mammoth's left arm reaching out to the left side, while the right arm remains extended forward. The third frame shows the left arm returning to the center position, but now the right arm is reaching out to the right side. Finally, both arms return to the initial position, creating a cyclical motion of playful reaching.

frames.beat: mammoth arms reach forward together, palms down
left arm extends outward, right arm stays put
right arm swings out, left arm returns to center
both arms return to a forward reach
